_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: the combination of abemaciclib plus LY3214996 resulted in a greater reduction in the number of PNF tumors per mouse as compared to either drug alone, with normalization of nerve microarchitecture
details: Combination of abemaciclib plus LY3214996 resulted in greater reduction in the number of PNF tumors per mouse compared to either drug alone, with normalization of nerve microarchitecture
